content.title: Repeated Jumu’ah Reminder Issue Fixed
content.subtitle: We’ve fixed the repeated notification issue. Update will be available soon on Play Store.
content.body:
Assalamu Alaikum,

We sincerely apologize for the issue that caused the Jumu’ah reminder notification to be sent repeatedly to some users today.

Our team has been actively investigating the problem since early morning. Alhamdulillah, we identified the root cause and have already implemented a fix. An updated version of the app containing this fix has been submitted to Google Play today and will be available as soon as Google's review process is completed.

Once the update is released, we kindly request everyone to update the app to the latest version. This will prevent the issue from occurring again, Insha’Allah.

We are especially grateful to everyone who reported the issue and patiently supported us while we worked on resolving it. Your feedback helps us continuously improve Muslims Day and serve the Muslim community better.

Jazakum Allahu Khairan for your understanding and support.

— Muslims Day Team
